heading: Two product families. One mission: affordable, dignified hearing care.
intro: InnerScope's hearing-technology IP and brand portfolio reach consumers through OTCHealth, the private operating company that holds the brand rights and operates OTCHealthMart.com as the consumer storefront.

brands.name: HearingAssist
brands.description: Affordable, simple, straightforward path to better hearing. From 2018 through 2023, HearingAssist was Walmart's largest dedicated hearing-aid supplier — reporting more than 500,000 units sold and over $72M in cumulative top-line revenue across that period. The brand expanded into CVS, RiteAid, and pharmacy networks and is operated today by OTCHealth, the private operating company.

brands.name: iHEAR & iHEAR Matrix
brands.description: Silicon Valley–engineered, FDA-cleared. Includes the iHEARtest at-home hearing screener, advanced hearing aids and PSAPs, and the iHEAR Matrix Rechargeable OTC Hearing Aids — placed in Walmart's nationwide OTC Hearing Aid Display in 4,218 stores at launch in November 2023. App-based control, remote fitting, and teleaudiology infrastructure originated with InnerScope's 2021 acquisition of iHEAR Medical and continue under OTCHealth's operation today.
